chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-911 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Brohi, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
